subject: FW: Proposed Investment Terms
body:
From: Duncan Yin [mailto:dyin@hdam.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, April 15, 2008 12:33 PM
To: Lesley Groff; Rahna Jalashgar
Subject: Proposed Investment Terms

 

Jeffrey,

 

For your review and in preparation for your meeting tomorrow, please
find attached a set of proposed terms for an investment from your
clients.  For your convenience, I also enclose another copy of my
resume, in case your clients request it.

 

Please feel free to call with instructions or questions.  Bruce and I
look forward to hearing from you again.

 

Regards,

Duncan A. Yin

 

Work:  (203) 569-4524

Cell:  (203) 856-8148

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------
------------------------------------------------------

This correspondence is intended for the addressee only. The information
in this correspondence has been obtained from sources which Harbor Drive
Asset Management LLC ("HDAM") believes to be reliable. However, HDAM
does not guarantee its accuracy, and such information may be incomplete
or condensed. Opinions in this correspondence represent HDAM's position
as of this date and are subject to change without notice. This
correspondence is for informational purposes only and is not intended as
an offer or solicitation in regard to the purchase or sale of any
security. HDAM and/or its officers and employees may from time to time
acquire, hold, or sell a position in the securities mentioned herein.
Upon request, HDAM will furnish specific information in this regard. If
HDAM is involved in the purchase or sale of any security, HDAM may act
as principal for its own account or as agent for the buyer and/or the
seller.
